creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 168962
shar with new port www/rubygem-gollum-rugged_adapter

Hello,

attached a shar with the new port www/rubygem-gollum-rugged_adapter. This port allows Gollum to use Rugged at the backend. It is also a requirement to update www/gitlab.

Buildtests are done for 9.3, 10.0, 10.1, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. Also a runtime test with www/gitlab was done. All is fine :)

Greetings,
Torsten
